nasb.text: The prophet Gad said to David, “Do not stay in the stronghold; depart, and go into the land of Judah.” So David departed and went into the forest of Hereth.

esv.text: Then the prophet Gad said to David, “Do not remain in the stronghold; depart, and go into the land of Judah.” So David departed and went into the forest of Hereth.

cnv.text: 迦得先知對大衛說：“你不要留在山寨，要到猶大地去。”大衛就離開那裡，往哈列的森林去了。

ccb.text: 迦得先知吩咐大卫离开堡垒回犹大去，大卫就动身前往哈列的树林。
